evals.name: Image classification with trainnet
evals.description: Train a CNN classifier on a standard dataset. Tests that the agent uses trainnet, dlnetwork, and testnet instead of legacy APIs.
evals.prompt: Train a neural network classifier on the digits dataset in MATLAB. Evaluate accuracy on a held-out test set and report the results.

assertions.description: Uses dlnetwork to define the network
Does not use patternnet or shallow nets API

evals.name: Transfer learning with imagePretrainedNetwork
evals.description: Fine-tune a pretrained model. Tests that the agent uses imagePretrainedNetwork instead of manual layer surgery.
evals.prompt: Fine-tune a pretrained SqueezeNet on a folder of images with 5 classes and classify a new image. Use the MerchData dataset located at <MerchData-path>.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox available, SqueezeNet support package installed. Before running this eval, obtain the MerchData dataset by running: openExample('nnet/TransferLearningWithDeepNetworkDesignerExample') in MATLAB, then unzip MerchData.zip to a known location. Replace <MerchData-path> in the prompt with the actual path.

assertions.description: Does not use layerGraph for manual layer replacement
Does not use classify for inference

evals.name: Multi-output network with per-output metrics
evals.description: Train a multi-output network. Tests that the agent uses trainnet with a function handle loss, metric objects with NetworkOutput for per-output evaluation, and no custom training loop.
evals.prompt: Train a deep learning network with two outputs in MATLAB: classify digit labels AND predict rotation angle. Use the digits dataset with random rotations applied. Evaluate accuracy for the classification head and RMSE for the regression head, reported separately.

assertions.description: Does not use dlfeval (custom training loop)
Does not use dlgradient (custom training loop)
Uses NetworkOutput to route metrics to specific outputs
Uses testnet with metric objects for post-training evaluation rather than manual metric computation
assertions.expected: Uses testnet with metric objects (such as accuracyMetric or rmseMetric) for evaluation, rather than computing metrics manually

evals.name: Pattern recognition terminology redirect
evals.description: Tests that 'pattern recognition network' produces fitcnet (preferred), NOT patternnet.
evals.prompt: Create a pattern recognition network with 20 hidden neurons to classify iris data into 3 species in MATLAB.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox available

assertions.description: Does not use patternnet in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call patternnet as part of the working solution. Mentions of patternnet in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

assertions.description: Does not use shallow nets train()

evals.name: Time series with testnet evaluation
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses trainnet for sequences and testnet for evaluation, not trainNetwork with manual RMSE.
evals.prompt: Predict the next 10 values of a time series using an LSTM in MATLAB. Use a proper train/test split and report RMSE on the test set.

assertions.description: Uses testnet for evaluation, OR uses manual RMSE when closed-loop forecasting makes testnet inapplicable
assertions.expected: Uses testnet for open-loop evaluation OR computes RMSE manually for closed-loop forecasting (where predictions feed back as inputs)

evals.name: Function fitting terminology redirect
evals.description: Tests that 'function fitting network' produces fitrnet (preferred), NOT fitnet.
evals.prompt: Create a function fitting network to approximate a nonlinear mapping from 3 inputs to 1 output using synthetic data in MATLAB.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox available

assertions.description: Does not use shallow nets train()

evals.name: Simulink deployment
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses exportNetworkToSimulink or Predict block, NOT gensim.
evals.prompt: Generate a Simulink block for a feedforward network trained on time series data in MATLAB.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Simulink available

assertions.description: Does not use gensim in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call gensim as part of the working solution. Mentions of gensim in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

evals.name: Migrate fitnet multi-output to fitrnet
evals.description: Tests that modernizing a legacy fitnet script with multiple outputs produces fitrnet.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox available

assertions.description: Uses fitrnet for tabular multi-output regression
Does not use fitnet in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call fitnet as part of the working solution. Mentions of fitnet in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

assertions.description: Does not use shallow nets train()

evals.name: Migrate narxnet to nlarx
evals.description: Tests that modernizing a legacy narxnet script produces nlarx.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and System Identification Toolbox available

assertions.description: Does not use narxnet in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call narxnet as part of the working solution. Mentions of narxnet in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

assertions.description: Does not use preparets in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call preparets as part of the working solution. Mentions of preparets in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

assertions.description: Does not use closeloop in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call closeloop as part of the working solution. Mentions of closeloop in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

evals.name: Migrate narxnet without System Identification Toolbox
evals.description: Tests that modernizing a legacy narxnet script without System Identification Toolbox uses dlnetwork + trainnet with LM solver.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox available, System Identification Toolbox NOT available

assertions.description: Does not use narxnet in the generated solution code
assertions.expected: The final generated MATLAB script/code does not call narxnet as part of the working solution. Mentions of narxnet in explanatory text, migration tables, or comments describing what was replaced are acceptable and should NOT cause a failure.

evals.name: Non-default data layout with InputDataFormats
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses InputDataFormats when sequence data is provided in a non-default layout (channels×time) rather than manually transposing.
evals.prompt: I have sequence data stored as a cell array where each cell is a C×T numeric matrix (3 channels, variable-length time steps — each row is a channel). Classify each sequence into one of 4 categories using an LSTM in MATLAB. Evaluate accuracy on a held-out test set.

assertions.description: Uses InputDataFormats to specify the data layout
Does not manually transpose the sequence data

evals.name: Legacy API communication — acknowledges and redirects
evals.description: Tests that when a user explicitly asks for a legacy API by name, the agent acknowledges their request, explains the replacement, and provides the recommended solution.
evals.prompt: Use patternnet with 25 hidden neurons to classify my iris data (4 features, 3 classes) in MATLAB.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox available

assertions.description: Acknowledges patternnet by name in the response
Explains that patternnet has been replaced with a recommended alternative
assertions.expected: The response explains that patternnet is legacy/removed/replaced and names the recommended alternative (fitcnet or dlnetwork+trainnet)

assertions.description: Uses fitcnet as the recommended replacement
Does not actually use patternnet in the code
Does not use shallow nets train()

evals.name: Simulink deployment with Predict block for large network
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses the deeplib/Predict block (not exportNetworkToSimulink) when deploying a large pretrained network to Simulink.
evals.prompt: Fine-tune a pretrained EfficientNet-B0 on the MerchData dataset (5 classes, located at <MerchData-path>) and deploy it to a Simulink model for real-time inference.

context.setup: Deep Learning Toolbox and Simulink available, EfficientNet-B0 support package installed. Before running this eval, obtain the MerchData dataset by running: openExample('nnet/TransferLearningWithDeepNetworkDesignerExample') in MATLAB, then unzip MerchData.zip to a known location. Replace <MerchData-path> in the prompt with the actual path.

assertions.description: Saves the network to a MAT file
Uses add_block with the deeplib/Predict block
Does not use exportNetworkToSimulink (EfficientNet has unsupported layers)
Uses imagePretrainedNetwork for the pretrained model
